pi_items.source: setup_magento.sh REST API seeding code (line 281): Product created with SKU 'LAPTOP-001' and name 'Business Laptop Pro'
Custom attribute code to be created by user - not discoverable beforehand. Naming convention follows Magento standards (lowercase, underscores, max 30 chars).
Custom attribute label to be created by user - not discoverable beforehand

California Department of Tax and Fee Administration (CDTFA) official rates: $6 for screens <15 inches, $8 for screens 15-35 inches, $10 for screens ≥35 inches. Source: https://cdtfa.ca.gov/taxes-and-fees/covered-electronic-waste-recycling-fee/
Magento 2 Directory system: California has standard region_id of 12 (confirmed by multiple Magento documentation sources)
Magento 2 Directory system: United States has country code 'US' (standard in Magento)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic sample data created via Magento's REST API during environment setup. The Business Laptop Pro product (SKU: LAPTOP-001) is created with a price of $999.99. The metadata correctly identifies California as region_id 12 and US country code, which are verified Magento directory values. However, the $12.50 tax amount is fabricated—actual California Covered Electronic Waste Recycling Fees range from $6-$10 depending on screen size, not $12.50, according to official CDTFA guidelines.
